race.comment: Keen to side with MADIYYA (13) third up from a spell. Two runs back have been very good, beaten a head into third here last time over 1400m. She looks desperate for a mile there which she now gets, and she should get every hope sitting midfield from a good draw. MOMETZ (9)  ran on well last time at Sandown Hillside over 1400m on a tough day to make ground. Up to 1600m suits, he'll just likely be spotting them a big start again. Wary of TERRORTORIAN (19) who has gone bang-bang in two runs this time in, scoring dominantly in each. Tougher now but should be hard to hold out. FEARLESS FREDDY (7) improved to place last start and won the lone-third up attempt so could peak.
